title: machine-typed vals (embedding)
manager: A machine can own another machine by value — `val m : machine T` — embedding a whole sub-machine in its extended state, parent-driven, with the journal nesting so the child's mutations roll back with the parent's transaction. This is composition at the value level rather than the system level: a machine that contains a machine the way it contains any other data, gated in the rich tier like recursive ADTs.
cs: `val m : machine T` by-value embedding (fsl#160/#235); parent-driven, journal nests; rich-tier gate like recursive ADTs (W6.21); machine-as-value.
